publishedAbstract: - How to scale down and scale up Noobaa services?- In some scenarios, we may want to restart all noobaa pods. This solution will explain why.- Due to the architectural changes in ODF v4.19 and above, there are differences between how scaling is accomplished between ODF v4.18 and below and ODF v4.19,+ which will be covered in this solution.
publishedTitle: How to Control Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG)/NooBaa IO Through Scaling of Resources - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
